questions.stem: In the Hedgehog control model, what is the role of the Fabric Controller?

options.text: Watches CRDs, computes configurations, and updates Agent CRD specs
Runs on switches and applies configurations
Stores VPC definitions in a database

questions.stem: You run `kubectl apply -f vpc.yaml`. What is the correct order of operations that follows?

options.text: Fabric Controller watches VPC → Switch Agent applies config → Controller updates Agent spec → VPC created
VPC CRD created → Fabric Controller computes config → Controller updates Agent spec → Switch Agent applies via gNMI
Switch Agent applies config → Fabric Controller watches VPC → VPC CRD created → Controller updates spec
Controller updates Agent spec → VPC CRD created → Switch Agent applies config → Fabric Controller watches

questions.stem: True or False: If a switch reboots, you must manually re-run `kubectl apply` to reconfigure it.

options.text: True — you must re-apply manifests after a switch reboot
False — the Switch Agent automatically re-reads its Agent CRD and reapplies all configurations

questions.stem: Where can you find detailed information about a switch's BGP neighbors and interface states?

options.text: You must SSH into the switch
